$comment: vibe flow state machine. Static source of truth for the flow. States are compound <flow>.<phase> keys. Under D12 the per-turn orders are NOT stored here: skill-owning states carry inject:null and the orders live in the linked vibe skill's SKILL.md `## Orders (D12)` section (a <!-- vibe:orders:<state> --> block), resolved by .agents/skills/vibe/scripts/orders.sh. Only `idle` keeps an inline inject (skill-less fallback). The orders block is byte-stable; only <feature> interpolates, so the per-turn inject stays prompt-cache safe. set-state.sh is the only sanctioned writer of state.json. A single top-level `style` note governs output density for every state.

gates.feature.plan>feature.impl: human approves plan units + picks impl mode

style: No filler or hedging. Compress receipts and subagent summaries. Security warnings and irreversible-action confirmations always stay in full prose. Compression never reduces reasoning depth; code, paths, commands stay byte-exact.

idle.inject: state=idle · no active flow · pick a flow → run set-state.sh {setup.detect | strategy.brainstorm | feature.design | quick.triage}
idle.exit: user has named the work; agent has chosen a flow and called set-state.sh

setup.detect.exit: audit complete: missing/present harness pieces listed, plugin preflight run

setup.apply.exit: instructions block present, .agents/skills/vibe scaffolded, lessons.md exists, never clobbered user content

strategy.brainstorm.exit: direction is clear enough to write into root specs

strategy.spec.exit: root specs updated and validated; if a durable lesson surfaced, record it before going idle

feature.design.exit: feature product.md + tech.md written; design.md when full rigor; approach chosen

feature.plan.exit: plan.md has stable unit IDs; human approved moving to impl

feature.impl.exit: plan units implemented with tests that cite their unit IDs and pass

feature.verify.exit: evidence shows plan units satisfied; review clean; human approved shipping

feature.compound.exit: lesson recorded; cross-cutting decisions promoted; feature archived; digest regenerated

quick.triage.exit: root cause identified; fix is small and bounded (else escalate to feature)

quick.fix.exit: fix implemented with a test that reproduces and resolves the issue

quick.verify.exit: evidence shows fix works and regressions clear; if a durable lesson surfaced, record it before going idle
